title: Submit a valid lead enquiry from the contact page
description: A visitor can complete the contact form with valid details, submit it, and sees a success confirmation indicating the lead was saved.

steps.description: Click the link to contact the company
Fill "Alex Martin" into the name field
Fill "Demande de devis" into the subject field
Fill "Je souhaite obtenir un devis et des informations sur vos services." into the message field
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Avoid duplicate submission via rapid repeated submits
description: A visitor rapidly submitting the contact form multiple times results in a single successful submission flow with the UI preventing duplicate submissions.

steps.description: Fill "Alex Martin" into the name field
Fill "Demande de contact" into the subject field
Fill "Merci de me recontacter." into the message field
Verify only one success confirmation is visible

title: Correct validation errors and submit successfully
description: A visitor who initially submits invalid contact form data can correct the fields and then submit successfully to see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Fill "Alex Martin" into the name field
Fill "Je souhaite être contacté." into the message field
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Prevent submission when required fields are missing
description: A visitor attempting to submit the contact form with missing required fields sees validation errors and the lead is not submitted.

steps.description: Fill "Alex Martin" into the name field
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Validate email format before allowing submission
description: A visitor entering an invalid email in the contact form is shown an email validation error and cannot successfully submit until corrected.

steps.description: Fill "Alex Martin" into the name field
Fill "Bonjour, j’ai une question." into the message field
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Validate phone format before allowing submission
description: A visitor entering an invalid phone number in the contact form is shown a phone validation error and cannot successfully submit until corrected.

steps.description: Fill "Alex Martin" into the name field
Fill "Merci de me rappeler." into the message field
Verify a phone validation error is visible

title: Accept long message content without breaking submission
description: A visitor can submit the contact form with a very long message and still receives a success confirmation if the data is valid.

steps.description: Fill "Alex Martin" into the name field
Fill "Demande détaillée" into the subject field

Fill "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat. Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur." into the message field
Verify a success confirmation is visible
